title: Stellantis taps Mobileye for hands-free driving assist
summary: The parent company of Jeep and Ram said it would install Mobileye’s technology in its vehicles starting in 2027. The parent company of Jeep and Ram said it would install Mobileye’s technology in its vehicles starting in 2027.
